200.description: Paginated persisted log chunks for a test run.

info.title: Backend Test Runner API
info.description: MVP backend control plane and local runner engine.

statusReason.description: Human-readable terminal or cancellation reason for the current run state.

leaseExpiresAt.description: Current execution lease expiration; stale leases are failed by recovery.

heartbeatAt.description: Last persisted worker heartbeat for the execution lease owner.

attempt.description: Number of worker claims for this immutable run. Jobs are fail-fast by default.
